alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-12-01
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-01                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

next_step.current_state: First target record updated successfully. Reactive outbox verification appears non-applicable (this was a finance record update, not outbox). Continue remaining three OCR migrations.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and completed the requested OCR migrations for the four specified finance records. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file while preserving existing body content, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read required nested AGENTS files, used inbox and OCR/migration workflows, applied finance schema fields only, preserved note bodies, and deleted inbox item after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to run four listed finance docs through OCR workflow. Workflow docs define OCR as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter per schema while preserving body text. All four target records were updated accordingly with required invoice/bill fields and line items derived from visible tables, and the processed inbox file was deleted as mandated after completion.
